title: Connect Boards

posts.author: mnn (MNN)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to show a list of subitems useing connect boards.

In board No. 1, I do have Group “Customer” I show main detaila about the customer as subitems the contact person

In board No. 2, I do want to have a row conected to No1. to pick the “Customer” i an list and a second row " Contact person" to pick the person from the list, depent on “Customer”

Any one please help

posts.author: Cherryl_JetPack (Cherryl @ Jetpack)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mnn ,
The VLookup app enables you to easily connect columns, including subitems, between different boards.

Here’s a step-by-step tutorial on how to connect subitems.

If you need any assistance with VLOOKUP, don’t hesitate to contact our dedicated support team at appsupport@jetpackapps.co. Our team is always happy to help you with any queries or concerns.

Regards,
Cherryl

posts.cookedHtml:
